subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter was received. Due to lack of time, I pen but a brief reply. I pray thou wilt excuse me [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید نظر بعدم فرصت مختصر جواب مرقوم میگردد معذور دارید
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics
